title: Introducing Fluorescently Labeled CRISPR/Cas9 RNP Complex into Dinoflagellates
author: Brittany N Sprecher
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bei2jcge

steps.title: Combine 1 uL Alt-R™ CRISPR/Cas9 tracrRNA...
steps.instruction: Combine 1 uL Alt-R™ CRISPR/Cas9 tracrRNA – ATTO™ 550 (100 uM) + 1 L Alt-R™ CRISPR/Cas9 crRNA (100 uM) + 18 uL IDT Nuclease Free Buffer

steps.title: Incubate at 95˚C for 5 minutes,...
steps.instruction: Incubate at 95˚C for 5 minutes, let cool to room temperature on bench

steps.title: Meanwhile, combine 2
steps.instruction: Meanwhile, combine 2.67 uL Alt-R Cas9 Enzyme (61 uM) + 37.33 uL IDT Nuclease Free Buffer

steps.title: Form RNP complex by combining 1-part...
steps.instruction: Form RNP complex by combining 1-part gRNA (part 1) and 1-part Cas9 (part 3) and let incubate at room temperature for 20 mins.

steps.title: Note
steps.instruction: Note: the concentrations can and should be adjusted to determine optimal [RNP] and Cas9:gRNA ratios

steps.title: Note
steps.instruction: Note: RNP complexes can be kept at 4˚C for a month or 5 months at -80˚C

steps.title: Concentrate healthy Oxyrrhis marina cells using a flashlight
steps.instruction: Concentrate healthy Oxyrrhis marina cells using a flashlight. Make sure that under green light the cells have no background fluorescence (this may require not feeding them for some time)

steps.title: Count cell concentration of these healthy...
steps.instruction: Count cell concentration of these healthy cultures using a Sedgewick Rafter Counting Chamber. Goal is to use 200,000 cells/well for electroporation

steps.title: Spin down the O
steps.instruction: Spin down the O. marina cells that are necessary for the experimental set-up (need to include the NPC (no pulse controls) and scrambled gRNA control). Use 2500g for 2.5 mins

steps.title: Remove all but 2-5 mL of...
steps.instruction: Remove all but 2-5 mL of liquid, being very careful to not disturb the pellet. Transfer gently to 2 mL test tubes

steps.title: Centrifuge at 900g for 1 minute...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 900g for 1 minute and remove all remaining liquid

steps.title: For each experimental well use Lonza’s 16
steps.instruction: For each experimental well use Lonza’s 16.4 uL SG Buffer, Lonza’s 3.6 uL Supplement 1 Solution, and 2uL RNP complex (Step 4)

steps.title: Place 22 uL into each well...
steps.instruction: Place 22 uL into each well of Lonza’s Nucleocuvette™ 16-well strips very gently and electroporate using desired setting

steps.title: Immediately add 80 uL of filtered...
steps.instruction: Immediately add 80 uL of filtered and autoclaved seawater containing the antibiotic cocktail to limit bacteria growth

steps.title: After 20-30 minutes transfer each well...
steps.instruction: After 20-30 minutes transfer each well to a 24-well culture plate that already contains 1.4 mL of the same seawater described above

steps.title: After 1
steps.instruction: After 1.5-2 hours try to observe the cells for red fluorescence to demonstrate RNP complex uptake under green light

steps.title: Continue to observe cells for fluorescence...
steps.instruction: Continue to observe cells for fluorescence for 3 days (many experiments have shown RNP complexes are mostly degraded after 72 hours)

steps.title: Isolate gDNA after ~72 hours and...
steps.instruction: Isolate gDNA after ~72 hours and perform T7E1 endonuclease assay to determine gene editing efficiency
